sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Rejoice, Jerusalem, and all who love her. Be joyful, all who were in mourning; exult and be satisfied at her consoling breast.

sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: Taste and see the goodness of the Lord.

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm
sections.snippet: I will get up and go to my Father and shall say to him: Father, I have sinned against heaven and against you.

sections.title: Be Not Far from Me
sections.author: Timothy R. Smith
sections.snippet: Be not far from me when trouble is near. Lord, deliver me from my fear. Be my sure defense through storming rage, My rock, my deliverer, ever age to age.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: You must rejoice, my son, for your brother was dead and has come to life; he was lost and is found.

sections.title: Christ in Me Arise
sections.author: Trevor Thomson
sections.snippet: Christ in me arise and dispel all the darkness. Christ in me arise with your power and your strength. Christ in me pour out your blessing and healing. Christ in me arise and I shall rise with you.

sections.title: Holy Darkness
sections.author: Dan Schutte
sections.snippet: Holy darkness, blessed night, heaven's answer hidden from our sight. As we await you, O God of silence, we embrace your holy night.

sections.title: 10,000 Reasons (Bless the Lord)
sections.author: Jonas Myrin / Matt Redman
sections.snippet: Bless the Lord, O my soul, O my soul; worship his holy name. Sing like never before, O my soul; I’ll worship your holy name.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
